intro: I am excited to apply for the Senior AWS Data Engineer role at Capnexus. My experience designing Python-based ETL pipelines and automating cloud workflows aligns closely with your requirements.
body: At CITI, I built large-scale Python/PySpark ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry into AWS S3/Glue/Redshift and orchestrated batch and event-driven workflows using Lambda and Step Functions.
I implemented GenAI-assisted Text-to-SQL agents to automate data pipelines, ensured data quality and monitoring, and integrated API connectors for reliable enterprise data ingestion.

I have experience designing dashboards, reporting pipelines, and automation frameworks for production-grade analytics, collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver reliable, scalable cloud solutions.
conclusion: I am eager to bring my AWS cloud, DevOps, and AI-assisted data pipeline expertise to Capnexus to deliver high-quality, automated data engineering solutions.
